name: Panfried mackerel with golden beet & orange salsa

ingredients.item: 1 tbsp harissa paste (store-bought or see recipe)
ingredients.original: 1 tbsp harissa paste (store-bought or see recipe)

ingredients.item: 4 mackerel fillets (about 9 oz / 260 g in total), with skin
ingredients.original: 4 mackerel fillets (about 9 oz / 260 g in total), with skin

ingredients.item: 1 medium golden beet (3½ oz / 100 g in total)
ingredients.original: 1 medium golden beet (3½ oz / 100 g in total)

ingredients.item: ¼ cup / 30 g pitted Kalamata olives, quartered lengthwise
ingredients.original: ¼ cup / 30 g pitted Kalamata olives, quartered lengthwise

ingredients.item: ½ small red onion, finely chopped (¼ cup / 40 g in total)
ingredients.original: ½ small red onion, finely chopped (¼ cup / 40 g in total)

ingredients.item: ¼ cup / 15 g chopped flat-leaf parsley
ingredients.original: ¼ cup / 15 g chopped flat-leaf parsley

ingredients.item: ½ tsp coriander seeds, toasted and crushed
ingredients.original: ½ tsp coriander seeds, toasted and crushed

ingredients.item: ¾ tsp cumin seeds, toasted and crushed
ingredients.original: ¾ tsp cumin seeds, toasted and crushed
